name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: --emit-report writes scenarios_run/passed/failed/tokens_spent for budget transparency
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --emit-report "$PWD/report.json" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'scenarios_run' report.json && grep -q 'scenarios_passed' report.json && echo report_shape 1>&2
